name: Quantity
unifying_role: connects counting, magnitude, comparison, and modeling
invariant_or_preserved_structure: same numerical form across different objects
interpretation_note: quantity abstracts from the thing counted or measured
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Proportion
unifying_role: connects number, similarity, scale, music, rate, and modeling
interpretation_note: proportion is a bridge between arithmetic and geometry
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Proof
invariant_or_preserved_structure: truth under accepted rules and assumptions
interpretation_note: proof unifies mathematical claims through justified dependency
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Algorithm
interpretation_note: algorithmic thinking predates computers but becomes formal in computer science
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Equation
unifying_role: represents relation of equality across contexts
interpretation_note: equations unify constraints, curves, models, and systems
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Function
interpretation_note: functions connect formulas, curves, processes, algorithms, and random variables
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Derivative

audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Integral
unifying_role: connects area, accumulation, expectation, and measure

name: Probability

name: Model
unifying_role: connects formal structure to target systems
invariant_or_preserved_structure: selected relation between formal system and target system
interpretation_note: model unity requires explicit assumptions and validation
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?

name: Category
unifying_role: studies objects, morphisms, composition, and preservation
interpretation_note: category theory unifies by transformation rather than by reducing all objects to one type

name: Formal verification
unifying_role: connects proof, logic, type theory, and computation
interpretation_note: formal verification checks derivations but does not replace human interpretation
audit_question: How does this idea move across fields without erasing contextual difference?
